MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Jery Lipkin, Esq. 707-246-8037 for Plaintiff DCFS TRUST.
No other Appearance.

RULING - The matter is Uncontested. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF DCFS TRUST's MOTION For Amendment Of Judgment.

Plaintiff DCFS Trust's motion for amendment of judgment is granted. No opposition filed.

Order and Amended Judgment are signed. (see scanned order and judgment for details)
